mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_scores ( place_id, tripmind_score, google_score, review_count, food_score, price_score, ambiance_score, service_score, nationality_breakdown ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{tripmindScore}, #{googleScore}, #{reviewCount}, #{foodScore}, #{priceScore}, #{ambianceScore}, #{serviceScore}, #{nationalityBreakdown}::text )
mapper.update: UPDATE place_scores SET tripmind_score = #{tripmindScore}, google_score = #{googleScore}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, food_score = #{foodScore}, price_score = #{priceScore}, ambiance_score = #{ambianceScore}, service_score = #{serviceScore}, nationality_breakdown = #{nationalityBreakdown}::text, last_calculated_at = NOW() WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
